user_story: I follow @papanda on Zora and want to support them by buying their 'zora' trend coin directly with ZORA tokens I already hold. Single-hop V4 swap, no multi-hop needed.

turns.prompt: Look up the Zora creator @papanda and show me their 'zora' trend coin (address 0x2748009c2c5d46b78a3a7bdfd5b121edfb72f519). I want to know the pool currency, holder count, and current price in ZORA.

Good. This is a DRY-RUN — don't worry about my actual ZORA balance or allowance state, I'm validating the call shape. Fetch papanda's 'zora' trend coin pool details with zora_get_coin, activate the zora skill, then encode and simulate a single-hop V4 swap that spends 50 ZORA (50e18 in base units) for that coin with 5% slippage. Show me the encoded calldata even if the simulation reverts on balance.
